name: Mike Holloway
signature_move: After being exposed as the primary target at the Survivor Auction (Day 25), Mike won 5 consecutive individual immunity challenges from Final 7 to Final 4, making himself immune every time the majority alliance could have eliminated him.
strategy_summary: Mike's game is the quintessential challenge beast path to victory. After leading the Blue Collar alliance to merge dominance, he overplayed his hand by publicly confronting Rodney's sub-alliance at the Survivor Auction, instantly becoming public enemy number one. From that point forward, he survived exclusively through individual immunity wins and a well-timed hidden immunity idol play, then leveraged the jury's respect for his fighting spirit to win a decisive 6-1-1 final vote against Carolyn and Will.
fun_fact: Mike's 5 consecutive individual immunity wins from the Final 7 onward is one of the longest end-game immunity streaks in Survivor history, and he is one of the few winners who was the primary target at virtually every post-merge tribal council he attended.
